- Title: "Dentist Appointment" (description: "Regular dental check-up")

I can reschedule this event to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00 AM and keep the same 1-hour duration. The calendar system will automatically email current participants (yourself). However, the clinic is not listed as a participant, and I couldn't find a contact email for "Downtown Dental Clinic" in your contacts.

- The clinic's email address so I can add them as a participant (they will then receive the reschedule notification), or
- Your confirmation to reschedule anyway (this will notify only the participants already on the event — i.e., you).

Also tell me if you want a custom message included in the notification email to the clinic (e.g., "Rescheduled per request — see new time below"), or if the default calendar notification is fine.
